title: Response Commitment, Problem Details, Streaming, and Downloads · Type-System Trace: Rfc9457 Problem Mapping
summary: Handlers write success before work completes, expose stack traces, send inconsistent problem objects, ignore stream backpressure, and assume errors can replace committed headers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts rfc9457 problem mapping increment in single-owner response and bounded stream protocol. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map stable internal failures to RFC 9457 types, status, title, detail, instance, extensions, localization, and disclosure policy.
